title: puliculum articulatum
intro: Puliculum articulatum, also known as Wild Chamomile or Pineapple Weed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and pineapple-like fragrance. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Puliculum articulatum include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting better sleep, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
